users_query: SELECT id, name, age, is_verified, premium_until, created_at FROM profiles ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 100
reported_messages_query: SELECT m.*, p.name as sender_name FROM messages m JOIN profiles p ON m.sender_id = p.id WHERE m.is_reported = true
ban_user_action: UPDATE profiles SET is_banned = true WHERE id = {{ user_id }}
daily_stats_query: SELECT * FROM admin_daily_stats ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 30
